moments.title: The Open Championship underway
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship is being played from July 16-19, 2026, at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England.

angles.name: Live updates
angles.copy: It's golf's biggest weekend! The Open Championship is LIVE from Royal Birkdale. Who are you backing for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Local focus
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale is buzzing! The Open Championship is bringing world-class golf to Southport all weekend. Are you heading down?

moments.title: Love Island 2026 Final
moments.blurb: The 13th season of Love Island UK concludes with its grand final on Monday, July 27, 2026, at 9pm on ITV2 and ITVX.

angles.name: Countdown to finale
angles.copy: The countdown is ON! Love Island 2026 wraps up on July 27th. Who do you think will be crowned the winning couple?

angles.name: Catch up
angles.copy: Still catching up on the villa drama? The Love Island final is just over a week away. Get ready for recouplings and declarations!

moments.title: Latitude Festival kicks off
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival 2026 runs from July 23-26 at Henham Park, Suffolk, featuring headliners David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Festival hype
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is just a week away! Ready for David Byrne, Teddy Swims & Lewis Capaldi in Suffolk? Who are you most excited to see?

angles.name: Suffolk's big weekend
angles.copy: Henham Park is about to get LOUD! Latitude Festival is bringing huge names to Suffolk from July 23-26. Are you going?

moments.title: London Athletics Meet
moments.blurb: The London Athletics Meet, a highlight of the 2026 athletics season, takes place on Saturday, July 18, 2026, at the London Stadium.

angles.name: Track & Field action
angles.copy: Get ready for world-class athletics! The London Athletics Meet is at London Stadium this Saturday. Who's your favourite to win?

angles.name: London's sporting weekend
angles.copy: The London Stadium hosts the Athletics Meet this weekend! Don't miss the chance to see global stars compete.

moments.title: Glasgow Commonwealth Games begin
moments.blurb: The Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games will run from July 23 to August 2, welcoming over 3,000 athletes to Scotland's biggest city.

angles.name: Games are coming
angles.copy: The Commonwealth Games are heading to Glasgow next week! Get ready for 11 days of incredible sport from July 23rd.

angles.name: Scotland's turn to shine
angles.copy: Glasgow, are you ready? The Commonwealth Games kick off next week, bringing world-class competition to our city!

moments.title: Summer School Holidays continue
moments.blurb: Summer school holidays are now in full swing across much of the UK, with schools in England and Wales generally breaking up around July 20, 2026.

angles.name: Holiday vibe
angles.copy: School's out for summer! Many families are now enjoying the long summer break. What are your plans for the holidays?

angles.name: Travel plans
angles.copy: The great summer getaway is well underway! Planning a staycation or heading abroad during the school holidays?

moments.title: UK heatwave continues
moments.blurb: The UK is experiencing a prolonged period of hot weather, with temperatures reaching 30-32C in parts of England and Wales, expected to continue for several more days.

angles.name: Stay cool
angles.copy: Another scorcher today! Temperatures remain high across the UK. Remember to stay hydrated and keep cool!

angles.name: Weather update
angles.copy: The hot spell continues across the UK, with some areas seeing temps above 30C. Don't forget the sun cream!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Vikki Carr
moments.blurb: American singer Vikki Carr, known for her easy listening and pop hits, turns 86 on July 19, 2026.

angles.name: Birthday wish
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 86th Birthday to the legendary Vikki Carr this Sunday! What's your favourite song from her?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Kim Carnes
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer Kim Carnes, famous for her 1981 hit 'Bette Davis Eyes', turns 81 on July 20, 2026.

angles.name: Birthday shout-out
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to the incredible Kim Carnes this Monday! Still sounds amazing after all these years. #BetteDavisEyes

moments.title: Happy Birthday Carlos Santana
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana, known for his pioneering blend of rock, Latin, and jazz, celebrates his 79th birthday on July 20, 2026.

angles.name: Guitar god
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Carlos Santana on Monday! His guitar riffs are legendary. What's your favourite Santana track?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Paul Cook
moments.blurb: Paul Cook, drummer for the influential punk band The Sex Pistols, turns 70 on July 20, 2026.

angles.name: Punk rock royalty
angles.copy: Happy 70th Birthday to Paul Cook of The Sex Pistols this Monday! Still inspiring generations of punk rock. #SexPistols

moments.title: Happy Birthday Don Henley
moments.blurb: Don Henley, co-founder, drummer, and vocalist of the Eagles, celebrates his 79th birthday on July 22, 2026.

angles.name: Eagles legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Don Henley this Wednesday! What's your top Eagles song?

moments.title: Happy Birthday George Clinton
moments.blurb: Funk music pioneer George Clinton, leader of Parliament-Funkadelic, turns 85 on July 22, 2026.

angles.name: Funk master
angles.copy: Happy 85th Birthday to the one and only George Clinton this Wednesday! Get up for the down stroke! #Funkadelic

moments.title: Happy Birthday David Essex
moments.blurb: English singer, songwriter, and actor David Essex, known for hits like 'Gonna Make You a Star', turns 78 on July 23, 2026.

angles.name: 70s icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 78th Birthday to the brilliant David Essex this Thursday! What's your favourite of his tunes?
